info.title: Cascade CMS API
info.description: OpenAPI 3.1.0 specification for the Cascade CMS REST API. Derived from the WSDL-generated spec with REST-specific patches applied (flat arrays, boolean success, integer[] file data).

MessageMarkType.description: For marking messages - read or unread

SearchFieldString.description: Asset fields to search (e.g. name, title, content), see searchField simpleType for valid values

AuditTypes.description: Represents the different kinds of audits in the system.

AllLevel.description: Defines the access level for all users.

AclEntryType.description: The type of ACL entry, either 'user' or 'group'.

UserAuthTypes.description: The various ways a user can be authenticated in Cascade Server.

NamingRuleCase.description: Case rules for asset naming conventions.

NamingRuleSpacing.description: Spacing rules for asset naming conventions.

NamingRuleAsset.description: Asset types that naming rules can be applied to.

RecycleBinExpiration.description: Duration before recycled assets are permanently deleted.

ScheduledDestinationMode.description: For Sites, Targets, Publish Sets scheduledPublishDestinationMode property

MetadataFieldVisibility.description: Enumeration of the possible metadata field visibilities

DynamicMetadataFieldType.description: The different types of dynamic metadata fields

DayOfWeek.description: Days of the week for scheduling.

SerializationType.description: The various serialization types for a target.

FtpProtocolType.description: FTP protocol variants for transport connections.

WorkflowNamingBehavior.description: The different options for naming an instance of a workflow definition

TwitterQueryType.description: Query types for Twitter feed blocks.

LinkRewriting.description: Link rewriting behavior for assets during publishing.

SiteLinkRewriting.description: Site-level link rewriting behavior during publishing.

StructuredDataType.description: The different types of a structured data node

StructuredDataAssetType.description: The different types of assets a structured data node can contain

Authentication.description: Unless an apiKey is provided, both username and password are REQUIRED.

path.description: When reading a site, the "path" element should be populated with the site's name.

Path.description: Represents a path to an asset in the Cascade CMS hierarchy.

id.description:
When editing and selected asset is recycled, it is recommended to preserve this relationship by providing selected asset's id in case if the selected asset gets restored from the recycle bin.
- One is REQUIRED.

path.description: Path works only for non-recycled assets

recycled.description: NOT REQUIRED: For reading purposes only. Ignored when editing, copying etc.

Identifier.description: Identifies an asset by ID and/or path, along with its type and site context.

id.description: The id of the asset. When creating, this should not be present as an asset does not have an id until it is created. When editing, specify this to uniquely identify an asset.

BaseAsset.description:
All assets inherit from base asset.
- The id of the asset. When creating, this should not be present as an asset does not have an id until it is created. When editing, specify this to uniquely identify an asset.

to.description: REQUIRED: Who the message was/will be sent to.

from.description: NOT REQUIRED: Who sent the message. Not necessary when sending a message.

subject.description: REQUIRED: The subject of the message.

date.description: NOT REQUIRED: The date the message was sent. Not necessary when sending a message.

body.description: REQUIRED: The body of the message.

Message.description: Represents a message within the system

searchTerms.description: The search terms to use for the search query.

siteId.description:
NOT REQUIRED
- Id of the site to search. If left blank, all sites will be searched.

siteName.description:
NOT REQUIRED
- Name of the site to search. If left blank, all sites will be searched.

searchFields.description:
NOT REQUIRED
- Asset fields to search (e.g. name, title, content).

searchTypes.description:
NOT REQUIRED
- Asset types to search (e.g. page, folder, site). If left blank, all asset types will be searched.

destinationContainerIdentifier.description: The identifier for the destination container where the asset will be copied to.

doWorkflow.description: Indicates whether a workflow should be initiated after the copy operation.

newName.description: The new name for the copied asset.

unpublish.description: NOT REQUIRED: When true, the asset will be unpublished. Default: false.

destinations.description: NOT REQUIRED: Unpublishes the asset from the given destinations. Default: all enabled destinations in the asset's site.

UnpublishParameters.description: Parameters used when unpublishing an asset

destinationContainerIdentifier.description: NOT REQUIRED: The container into which the asset will be moved. If left empty, the asset will remain in its current container

doWorkflow.description: Determines if a workflow should be executed

newName.description: NOT REQUIRED: Name to give the asset. If left empty, the asset's name will not be changed

doWorkflow.description: Determines if a workflow should be executed

identifier.description: NOT REQUIRED: Filter the assets by a certain entity.

username.description: NOT REQUIRED: Filter the audits by a given user name.

groupname.description: NOT REQUIRED: Filter the audits by a given group name. The audits for all users in the group will be returned.

rolename.description: NOT REQUIRED: Filter the audits by a given role.

startDate.description: NOT REQUIRED: Filter the audits by a start time. Only audits for events that happened after this time will be included.

endDate.description: NOT REQUIRED: Filter the audits by an end time. Only audits for events that happened before this time will be included.

auditType.description: NOT REQUIRED: Filter the audits by an audit type. Only audits of this type will be returned in the response.

AuditParameters.description: Parameters when getting the audits from the system

message.description: A message providing details about the operation result. Present on failure, absent on success.

OperationResult.description: The result of an API operation, indicating success or failure.

user.description: REQUIRED: The user that performed the audited action.

action.description: REQUIRED: The type of action the user performed.

identifier.description: NOT REQUIRED: The identifier identifying the asset the action was performed on, if any.

date.description: REQUIRED: The date and time the action was performed.

audits.description: REQUIRED: Represents the audits in the system.

workflowId.description: REQUIRED: The id of the workflow to perform the transition on.

actionIdentifier.description: REQUIRED: The identifier of the action to transition to.

transitionComment.description: NOT REQUIRED: The user's comment about the transition taken.

workingCopyIdentifier.description: NOT REQUIRED: Identifier for the working copy.

createdAssetId.description: When creating an asset, this will contain the ID of the created asset

CreateResult.description: When creating an asset, this will contain the ID of the created asset

messages.description: NOT REQUIRED: A list of messages.

stepIdentifier.description: REQUIRED: The step's unique text identifier/name.

stepAssignment.description: REQUIRED: The step's assignment (user or group name).

workflowName.description: REQUIRED: When the workflow is instantiated, this will be its name.

workflowDefinitionId.description: Priority: workflowDefinitionId > workflowDefinitionPath. One is REQUIRED.

workflowDefinitionPath.description: Priority: workflowDefinitionId > workflowDefinitionPath. One is REQUIRED.

workflowComments.description: REQUIRED: The comments for this operation which will be recorded with the workflow.

workflowStepConfigurations.description: NOT REQUIRED: default: the defaults as defined in the workflow definition.

endDate.description: Optional due date for the workflow. If not specified, will default to 7 days from today.

name.description: REQUIRED on create, ignored on edit. Use move operation to rename an asset.

Tag.description: A single tag that can be applied to an asset.

parentFolderId.description:
REQUIRED: on create, ignored on edit: The parent folder relationship.
- Priority: parentFolderId > parentFolderPath.
- One is REQUIRED.

parentFolderPath.description: REQUIRED: on create, ignored on edit.

path.description: NOT REQUIRED: The path of an asset.

lastModifiedDate.description:
NOT REQUIRED: When this asset was last modified.
- Read only.

lastModifiedBy.description:
NOT REQUIRED: Who last modified this asset.
- Read only.

createdDate.description:
NOT REQUIRED: When this asset was created.
- Read only.

createdBy.description:
NOT REQUIRED: Who created this asset.
- Read only.

siteId.description: One is REQUIRED: The Site in which the asset is located.

tags.description: NOT REQUIRED: Content Tags assigned to the asset.

FolderContainedAsset.description: Representing all home-area assets that are contained in a folder

FieldValue.description: A single value within a structured field.

name.description: The name of the dynamic metadata field.

fieldValues.description: The values assigned to this dynamic metadata field.

DynamicMetadataField.description: A dynamic metadata field entry containing a name and its associated values.

Metadata.description:
The content of the wired metadata fields.
- None of the fields are required and the defaults are empty.

metadata.description: The individual wired metadata fields NOT REQUIRED default: all empty

metadataSetId.description:
NOT REQUIRED: For defining the metadata set relationship.
- Priority: metadataSetId > metadataSetPath

metadataSetPath.description:
NOT REQUIRED: For defining the metadata set relationship.
- Priority: metadataSetId > metadataSetPath

DublinAwareAsset.description: NOT REQUIRED: The individual wired metadata fields. | default: all empty.

expirationFolderId.description:
NOT REQUIRED: When editing and selected asset is recycled, it is recommended to preserve this relationship by providing selected asset's id in case if the selected asset gets restored from the recycle bin.
- Priority: expirationFolderId > expirationFolderPath

expirationFolderPath.description: NOT REQUIRED: Path works only for non-recycled assets.

expirationFolderRecycled.description: NOT REQUIRED: For reading purposes only. Ignored when editing, copying etc.

ExpiringAsset.description: An asset that can expire and be moved to an expiration folder.

Block.description: Block is an abstract type which the five concrete block types build on

feedURL.description: REQUIRED: The URL of an XML feed.

FeedBlock.description: A block which aggregates a URL as an XML feed

indexBlockType.description: NOT REQUIRED: The type of the index block. It takes 'folder' as a default. Default: 'folder'

indexedFolderId.description: NOT REQUIRED: The indexed folder relationship when indexBlockType is folder. Priority: indexedFolderId > indexedFolderPath. When editing and selected asset is recycled, it is recommended to preserve this relationship by providing selected asset's id in case if the selected asset gets restored from the recycle bin.

indexedFolderPath.description: NOT REQUIRED: Path works only for non-recycled assets.

indexedContentTypeId.description: NOT REQUIRED: The indexed content type relationship when indexBlockType is content-type. Priority: indexedContentTypeId > indexedContentTypePath. One is REQUIRED when indexBlockType is content-type.

indexedContentTypePath.description: NOT REQUIRED: The indexed content type relationship when indexBlockType is content-type. Priority: indexedContentTypeId > indexedContentTypePath. One is REQUIRED when indexBlockType is content-type.

indexedFolderRecycled.description: NOT REQUIRED: For reading purposes only. Ignored when editing, copying etc.

maxRenderedAssets.description: REQUIRED: The maximum number of assets to render in XML form for this index block.

depthOfIndex.description: REQUIRED: The folder depth to which the indexer will render assets in XML form.

renderingBehavior.description: NOT REQUIRED: The rendering behavior of the folder index block. Default: 'render-normally'.

indexPages.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether or not to index page assets. Default: false.

indexBlocks.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether or not to index block assets. Default: false.

indexLinks.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether or not to index (sym)link assets. Default: false.

indexFiles.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether or not to index file assets. Default: false.

indexRegularContent.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether or not to include path data. Default: false.

indexSystemMetadata.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether or not to include last modified date, last modified by, created date and created by. Default: false.

indexUserMetadata.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether or not to include wired/dynamic metadata. Default: false.

indexAccessRights.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether or not to include access rights information. Default: false.

indexTags.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether or not to include tags. Default: false.

indexUserInfo.description: NOT REQUIRED: When this is 'true', an element 'user-information' will be added towards the bottom of the rendered XML including information about the user's login, full name and group memberships. Default: false.

indexWorkflowInfo.description: NOT REQUIRED: When this is 'true', and this block is included in a page that is in workflow, an element containing the page's workflow information will be included in the rendered XML. Default: false.

appendCallingPageData.description: NOT REQUIRED: When this is 'true', the page which includes this index block will have its information also included at the bottom in a 'calling-page-data' element. Default: false.

sortMethod.description: NOT REQUIRED: How to sort the folder contents when rendering the XML content. Default: 'folder-order' for folder index blocks and 'alphabetical' for content type index blocks.

sortOrder.description: NOT REQUIRED: In what order to sort the assets in the index block. Default: ascending.

pageXML.description: NOT REQUIRED: The Page XML rendering option. Default: no-render.

IndexBlock.description: Block is an abstract type which the five concrete block types build on

text.description: REQUIRED: The text of the block.

type.description: REQUIRED: Each node has a type.

identifier.description:
REQUIRED: The text identifier of the node coming from corresponding field in Data Definition.
- If this node is preserved on the asset but the corresponding field no longer exists in Data Definition, the identifier's value will be "\<legacy\>".

structuredDataNodes.description: NOT REQUIRED: An array of structured data nodes.

blockId.description:
NOT REQUIRED: Priority: blockId > blockPath.
- When editing and the selected asset is recycled, it is recommended to preserve this relationship by providing the selected asset's id in case the selected asset gets restored from the recycle bin.
- The block assigned to this page region.

blockPath.description:
NOT REQUIRED: Priority: blockId > blockPath.
- Path works only for non-recycled assets.
- When editing and the selected asset is recycled, it is recommended to preserve this relationship by providing the selected asset's id in case the selected asset gets restored from the recycle bin.
- The block assigned to this page region.

fileId.description:
NOT REQUIRED:
- If assetType=file, one of fileId or filePath should be provided if an asset is selected for this node.
- If assetType=linkable, fileId or filePath should be populated if the selected linkable asset is a file.
- When editing and the selected asset is recycled, it is recommended to preserve this relationship by providing the selected asset's id in case the selected asset gets restored from the recycle bin.

filePath.description:
NOT REQUIRED:
- Path works only for non-recycled assets.
- If assetType=file, one of fileId or filePath should be provided if an asset is selected for this node.
- If assetType=linkable, fileId or filePath should be populated if the selected linkable asset is a file.
- When editing and the selected asset is recycled, it is recommended to preserve this relationship by providing the selected asset's id in case the selected asset gets restored from the recycle bin.

pageId.description:
NOT REQUIRED:
- If assetType=page, one of pageId or pagePath should be provided if an asset is selected for this node.
- If assetType=linkable, pageId or pagePath should be populated if the selected linkable asset is a page.
- When editing and the selected asset is recycled, it is recommended to preserve this relationship by providing the selected asset's id in case the selected asset gets restored from the recycle bin.

pagePath.description:
NOT REQUIRED:
- Path works only for non-recycled assets.
- If assetType=page, one of pageId or pagePath should be provided if an asset is selected for this node.
- If assetType=linkable, pageId or pagePath should be populated if the selected linkable asset is a page.
- When editing and the selected asset is recycled, it is recommended to preserve this relationship by providing the selected asset's id in case the selected asset gets restored from the recycle bin.

symlinkId.description:
NOT REQUIRED:
- If assetType=symlink, one of symlinkId or symlinkPath should be provided if an asset is selected for this node.
- If assetType=linkable, symlinkId or symlinkPath should be populated if the selected linkable asset is a symlink.
- When editing and the selected asset is recycled, it is recommended to preserve this relationship by providing the selected asset's id in case the selected asset gets restored from the recycle bin.

symlinkPath.description:
NOT REQUIRED:
- Path works only for non-recycled assets.
- If assetType=symlink, one of symlinkId or symlinkPath should be provided if an asset is selected for this node.
- If assetType=linkable, symlinkId or symlinkPath should be populated if the selected linkable asset is a symlink.
- When editing and the selected asset is recycled, it is recommended to preserve this relationship by providing the selected asset's id in case the selected asset gets restored from the recycle bin.

recycled.description:
NOT REQUIRED:
- Use for reading only - this attribute is not necessary when editing or creating and will not affect these operations if provided.
- If a path is provided, Cascade will look only for a non-recycled asset with the given path, even if 'recycled=true' is provided.

definitionId.description: NOT REQUIRED: Id of the Data Definition block. Priority: definitionId > definitionPath.

definitionPath.description: NOT REQUIRED: Path of the Data Definition block. Priority: definitionId > definitionPath.

structuredDataNodes.description: The structured data nodes that make up the structured data.

structuredData.description: A choice between structured data and xhtml content Priority: xhtml > structuredData One is REQUIRED

xhtml.description: The XHTML content of the block.

XhtmlDataDefinitionBlock.description: A block containing plain XHTML or Structured Data

xml.description: The XML content of the block REQUIRED

shouldBePublished.description:
NOT REQUIRED: default: true.
- Whether or not this asset can be published.

shouldBeIndexed.description:
NOT REQUIRED: default: true.
- Whether or not this asset can be indexed.

lastPublishedDate.description:
NOT REQUIRED:
- The last date this asset was published.

lastPublishedBy.description:
NOT REQUIRED:
- Who last published this asset.

PublishableAsset.description:
NOT REQUIRED: default: true.
- Whether or not this asset can be published.

text.description:
One is REQUIRED.
- Priority: text > data.
- A file either contains plaintext content or binary content (base64 encoded).

data.description:
One is REQUIRED.
- Priority: text > data.
- A file either contains plaintext content or binary content (base64 encoded).

rewriteLinks.description: Whether links in the file should be rewritten during publishing.

File.description: Represents a file asset in Cascade CMS.

children.description:
The array of children.
- Wrapper for an array of folder children (identifiers).

Folder.description: END Page and associated structured data types

name.description:
The name of this page region, for example, "DEFAULT", or "JAVASCRIPT-INCLUDE".
- This MUST correspond to the name of a region defined in the template. REQUIRED.

blockId.description: The block assigned at this page region. Priority: blockId > blockPath. NOT REQUIRED.

blockPath.description: Path works only for non-recycled assets.

blockRecycled.description: NOT REQUIRED: For reading purposes only. Ignored when editing, copying, etc.

noBlock.description: When this is set to true, this will keep a block defined at a lower level from applying to this region. NOT REQUIRED: default: false.

formatId.description: The format assigned at this page region, can be either XSLT or script. Priority: formatId > formatPath. NOT REQUIRED.

formatPath.description: Path works only for non-recycled assets.

formatRecycled.description: NOT REQUIRED: For reading purposes only. Ignored when editing, copying, etc.

noFormat.description: When this is set to true, this will keep a format defined at a lower level from applying to this region. NOT REQUIRED: default: false.

PageRegion.description: Properties specific to a page region.

name.description: REQUIRED: A single page configuration's name, such as 'XML' or 'Full HTML'.

defaultConfiguration.description: REQUIRED: Whether or not this is the default configuration.

templateId.description: NOT REQUIRED: The template for this configuration. Priority: templateId > templatePath.

templatePath.description: NOT REQUIRED: The template for this configuration. Priority: templateId > templatePath.

formatId.description: NOT REQUIRED: The overall XSLT format applied to this page configuration. Priority: formatId > formatPath.

formatPath.description: NOT REQUIRED: The overall XSLT format applied to this page configuration. Priority: formatId > formatPath.

formatRecycled.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether or not the format is recycled.

pageRegions.description: NOT REQUIRED: Regions of the page.

outputExtension.description: NOT REQUIRED: The output extension, if specified, of the page configuration.

includeXMLDeclaration.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether or not to include an XML declaration in the output.

publishable.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether or not the page is publishable.

PageConfiguration.description: A single page configuration's name, such as "XML" or "Full HTML".

configurationSetId.description:
For defining the configuration set or content type relationship.
- Priority: (contentTypeId > contentTypePath) > (configurationSetId > configurationSetPath).
- One is REQUIRED: contentTypeId | contentTypePath | configurationSetId | configurationSetPath

configurationSetPath.description:
For defining the configuration set or content type relationship.
- Priority: (contentTypeId > contentTypePath) > (configurationSetId > configurationSetPath).
- One is REQUIRED: contentTypeId | contentTypePath | configurationSetId | configurationSetPath

contentTypeId.description:
For defining the configuration set or content type relationship.
- Priority: (contentTypeId > contentTypePath) > (configurationSetId > configurationSetPath).
- One is REQUIRED: contentTypeId | contentTypePath | configurationSetId | configurationSetPath

contentTypePath.description:
For defining the configuration set or content type relationship.
- Priority: (contentTypeId > contentTypePath) > (configurationSetId > configurationSetPath).
- One is REQUIRED: contentTypeId | contentTypePath | configurationSetId | configurationSetPath

structuredData.description:
A page either contains XHTML content (plain WYSIWYG page) or structured data content.
- Priority: xhtml > structuredData. One is REQUIRED.

xhtml.description: A page either contains XHTML content (plain WYSIWYG page) or structured data content.

pageConfigurations.description:
The page configurations containing page-level region block/format assignments.
- NOT REQUIRED when creating a page, but you must submit assignment information when editing
- if you want to maintain the region assignments.

Page.description: BEGIN Page and associated structured data types

referencedAssetId.description:
For defining the referenced asset relationship.
- Priority: referencedAssetId > referencedAssetPath.
- One is REQUIRED.

referencedAssetPath.description:
For defining the referenced asset relationship.
- Priority: referencedAssetId > referencedAssetPath.
- One is REQUIRED.

referencedAssetType.description: The type of the referenced asset. REQUIRED.

Reference.description: The following concrete types extend folder-contained-asset

xml.description: REQUIRED: The XML content of the xslt format.

XsltFormat.description: Represents an XSLT format used for transformations in Cascade CMS.

script.description: REQUIRED: The script content of the scriptFormat.

ScriptFormat.description: Represents a script (Velocity) format in Cascade CMS.

linkURL.description: NOT REQUIRED: The fully qualified URL of this link.

Symlink.description: A symlink is not a UNIX symlink - it is simply an asset containing a hyperlink

formatId.description:
NOT REQUIRED: Overall xslt format applied to this template. Defaults to none.
- When editing and selected asset is recycled, it is recommended to preserve this relationship by providing the selected asset's ID in case it gets restored from the recycle bin.

formatPath.description: NOT REQUIRED: Path works only for non-recycled assets.

formatRecycled.description: NOT REQUIRED: For reading purposes only. Ignored when editing, copying, etc.

xml.description: REQUIRED: The XHTML content of the template.

pageRegions.description: NOT REQUIRED: The page regions and their block/xslt format assignments for this template. Defaults to all regions empty.

Template.description: Represents a template that defines the structure and layout of a page.

username.description: REQUIRED: The username of the user.

fullName.description: REQUIRED: The full name of the user.

authType.description: REQUIRED: The way the user is authenticated.

password.description:
REQUIRED:
- The password for this user.
- When authType is custom, this is not used.

enabled.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether or not this user is enabled. Default false.

groups.description: REQUIRED: A semi-colon separated list of groups this user is a member of.

defaultSiteId.description: NOT REQUIRED: Default Site for the user, defaultSiteId takes precedence if both fields are set.

ldapDN.description: REQUIRED if authType is ldap; otherwise, NOT REQUIRED.

groupName.description: REQUIRED: The name of the group.

users.description:
NOT REQUIRED:
- Semi-colon delimited list of all of the member users of this group.

role.description:
REQUIRED:
- The Roles for this group.
- Note that this role will also apply to all the members, possibly adding roles for those users.

roleType.description: NOT REQUIRED: The type of the role.

globalAbilities.description:
ONE is REQUIRED:
- The global or site abilities for the role.
- Use the correct one depending on the type of the role.

siteAbilities.description:
ONE is REQUIRED:
- The global or site abilities for the role.
- Use the correct one depending on the type of the role.

parentContainerId.description:
NOT REQUIRED on edit: For defining the container relationship.
- Priority: parentContainerId > parentContainerPath.
- Required on create, ignored on edit. Use move operation to move an asset after it has been created.

parentContainerPath.description:
NOT REQUIRED on edit: Priority: parentContainerId > parentContainerPath.
- One is REQUIRED on create, ignored on edit.

path.description:
NOT REQUIRED: The path of an asset.
- Left blank when creating, specify this to uniquely identify an asset when editing.

siteId.description:
NOT REQUIRED: The site in which the asset is located.
- Priority: siteId > siteName. One is REQUIRED.

siteName.description: NOT REQUIRED: Priority: siteId > siteName. One is REQUIRED.

AssetFactoryPluginParameter.description: A parameter for an asset factory plugin.

name.description: REQUIRED: Name of the asset factory plugin.

parameters.description: NOT REQUIRED: Parameters for the asset factory plugin.

AssetFactoryPlugin.description: A plugin attached to an asset factory.

applicableGroupNames.description: NOT REQUIRED: Semicolon-delimited list of string group names for which this asset is available for use. Leave out to assign no groups.

assetType.description: REQUIRED: The type of asset this factory will create.

baseAssetId.description:
NOT REQUIRED: The default/base asset for this factory.
- When editing and selected asset is recycled, it is recommended to preserve this relationship by providing the selected asset's ID in case it gets restored from the recycle bin.

baseAssetPath.description: NOT REQUIRED: Path works only for non-recycled assets.

baseAssetRecycled.description: NOT REQUIRED: For reading purposes only. Ignored when editing, copying, etc.

description.description: NOT REQUIRED: The description text for this factory which is displayed in the new menu. Defaults to null.

placementFolderId.description:
NOT REQUIRED: Where assets created from this factory must be placed if specified.
- When editing and selected asset is recycled, it is recommended to preserve this relationship by providing the selected asset's ID in case it gets restored from the recycle bin.

placementFolderPath.description: NOT REQUIRED: Path works only for non-recycled assets.

placementFolderRecycled.description: NOT REQUIRED: For reading purposes only. Ignored when editing, copying, etc.

allowSubfolderPlacement.description: NOT REQUIRED: When the placement folder is specified, this allows assets to be placed in subfolders of that folder as well. Defaults to false.

folderPlacementPosition.description: NOT REQUIRED: Assets created from this factory will be positioned at this folder position. Defaults to 0.

overwrite.description: NOT REQUIRED: If an asset is created from this factory and placed in a folder with an asset of the same name, whether or not that asset will be overwritten. Defaults to false.

workflowMode.description: REQUIRED: What workflow behavior to use when creating assets using this asset factory.

workflowDefinitionId.description: NOT REQUIRED: When workflowMode is 'factory-controlled', this specifies the workflow definition to use.

plugins.description: NOT REQUIRED: An array of asset factory plugins assigned to the asset factory. Defaults to empty.

AssetFactory.description: An asset factory used to create new assets with predefined settings.

applicableGroupNames.description: NOT REQUIRED: Semicolon-delimited list of string group names for which this asset is available for use.

description.description: NOT REQUIRED: String describing the asset factory container, displayed in the new menu.

children.description: NOT REQUIRED: The array of children.

AssetFactoryContainer.description: A container that holds asset factories.

pageConfigurationId.description:
Priority: pageConfigurationId > pageConfigurationName.
- One is REQUIRED.

pageConfigurationName.description: The name of the page configuration.

destinations.description: REQUIRED if "publishMode" is "selected-destinations", else NOT REQUIRED and ignored.

ContentTypePageConfiguration.description: Maps a content type to a specific page configuration.

dataDefinitionGroupPath.description:
NOT REQUIRED. This property is only applicable for data-definition type fields.
- It holds a list of ancestor data definition groups presented in the form of a path.

name.description:
REQUIRED for metadata and data-definition field type. NOT REQUIRED for xhtml field type.
- Use title, displayName, summary, teaser, keywords, description, author, startDate, endDate, reviewDate for wired metadata fields,
field name for dynamic metadata field or field identifier for a data definition field.

InlineEditableField.description: A field that can be edited inline within the Cascade CMS interface.

pageConfigurationSetId.description: One is REQUIRED: Priority: pageConfigurationSetId > pageConfigurationSetPath.

pageConfigurationSetPath.description: One is REQUIRED: Priority: pageConfigurationSetId > pageConfigurationSetPath.

metadataSetId.description: One is REQUIRED: Priority: metadataSetId > metadataSetPath.

metadataSetPath.description: One is REQUIRED: Priority: metadataSetId > metadataSetPath.

contentTypePageConfigurations.description: NOT REQUIRED: if not specified, the default publish mode 'all-destinations' is used for each pageConfiguration.

inlineEditableFields.description: NOT REQUIRED: if not specified, none of the regions or fields will be inline editable.

ContentType.description: Defines a content type that determines the structure and behavior of pages.

children.description: NOT REQUIRED: The array of children (identifiers).

ContentTypeContainer.description: A container that holds content types.

children.description: NOT REQUIRED: The array of children (identifiers).

ConnectorContentTypeLinkParam.description: A parameter for a connector content type link.

contentTypeId.description: REQUIRED: One of contentTypeId or contentTypePath must be specified.

contentTypePath.description: REQUIRED: One of contentTypeId or contentTypePath must be specified.

pageConfigurationId.description: NOT REQUIRED: Identifier for the page configuration.

pageConfigurationName.description: NOT REQUIRED: Name for the page configuration.

connectorContentTypeLinkParams.description: NOT REQUIRED: A list of connector content type link params.

ConnectorContentTypeLink.description: Links a connector to a content type with associated parameters.

auth1.description: NOT REQUIRED: First authentication token for the external application the connector connects to (usually a username or email address)

auth2.description: NOT REQUIRED: Second authentication token for the external application the connector connects to (usually a password)\nWrite only - hidden when read

url.description: NOT REQUIRED: URL of the external application the connector connects to

verified.description: NOT REQUIRED: Determines whether or not the connector has been verified\nRead only - editing a connector always unverifies it

verifiedDate.description: NOT REQUIRED: The date this connector was verified\nRead only - editing a connector always clears the verification date

connectorParameters.description: NOT REQUIRED: A list of connector parameters

Connector.description: A connector for publishing content to external systems.

WordPressConnector.description: A connector for publishing content to a WordPress site.

GoogleAnalyticsConnector.description: A connector for integrating with Google Analytics.

pageConfigurations.description: REQUIRED: The individual page configurations contained within this set.

PageConfigurationSet.description: A set of page configurations that define output channels for a site.

children.description: NOT REQUIRED: The array of children assets.

PageConfigurationSetContainer.description: A container that holds page configuration sets.

xml.description: REQUIRED: The XML content of this data definition.

DataDefinition.description: A structured data definition that defines the fields for structured data blocks.

children.description: NOT REQUIRED: The array of children.

DataDefinitionContainer.description: A container that holds data definitions.

xml.description: REQUIRED: The XML content of this shared field.

SharedField.description: A shared field definition that can be reused across multiple data definitions.

children.description: NOT REQUIRED: The array of children.

SharedFieldContainer.description: A container that holds shared fields.

value.description: NOT REQUIRED: The actual string value. When not provided, an empty string will be used.

label.description: NOT REQUIRED: Label displayed to the user editing an asset. When not provided, value will be displayed.

selectedByDefault.description: Whether or not this value should be checked by default when creating new assets through web UI.

DynamicMetadataFieldDefinitionValue.description: Represents a possible value for a dynamic metadata field

name.description: REQUIRED: The name of the dynamic metadata field.

label.description: REQUIRED: The label of the dynamic metadata field.

fieldType.description: The type of the dynamic metadata field REQUIRED

required.description: Whether or not this field is required.

visibility.description: The visibility of this field NOT REQUIRED default visible

possibleValues.description: REQUIRED for radio, checkbox, dropdown and multiselect types, ignored for text type.

helpText.description: Optional help text for this field.

DynamicMetadataFieldDefinition.description: A single dynamic metadata field definition

authorFieldRequired.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether the author field is required on assets using this metadata set. Default is false.

authorFieldVisibility.description: NOT REQUIRED: The visibility of the author field for assets using this metadata set. Default is 'visible'.

authorFieldHelpText.description: NOT REQUIRED: The help text for the author field.

descriptionFieldRequired.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether the description field is required on assets using this metadata set. Default is false.

descriptionFieldVisibility.description: NOT REQUIRED: The visibility of the description field for assets using this metadata set. Default is 'visible'.

descriptionFieldHelpText.description: NOT REQUIRED: The help text for the description field.

displayNameFieldRequired.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether the display name field is required on assets using this metadata set. Default is false.

displayNameFieldVisibility.description: NOT REQUIRED: The visibility of the display name field for assets using this metadata set. Default is 'visible'.

displayNameFieldHelpText.description: NOT REQUIRED: The help text for the display name field.

endDateFieldRequired.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether the end date field is required on assets using this metadata set. Default is false.

endDateFieldVisibility.description: NOT REQUIRED: The visibility of the end date field for assets using this metadata set. Default is 'visible'.

endDateFieldHelpText.description: NOT REQUIRED: The help text for the end date field.

expirationFolderFieldRequired.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether the expiration folder field is required on assets using this metadata set. Default is false.

expirationFolderFieldVisibility.description: NOT REQUIRED: The visibility of the expiration folder field for assets using this metadata set. Default is 'visible'.

expirationFolderFieldHelpText.description: NOT REQUIRED: The help text for the expiration folder field.

keywordsFieldRequired.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether the keywords field is required on assets using this metadata set. Default is false.

keywordsFieldVisibility.description: NOT REQUIRED: The visibility of the keywords field for assets using this metadata set. Default is 'visible'.

keywordsFieldHelpText.description: NOT REQUIRED: The help text for the keywords field.

reviewDateFieldRequired.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether the review date field is required on assets using this metadata set. Default is false.

reviewDateFieldVisibility.description: NOT REQUIRED: The visibility of the review date field for assets using this metadata set. Default is 'visible'.

reviewDateFieldHelpText.description: NOT REQUIRED: The help text for the review date field.

startDateFieldRequired.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether the start date field is required on assets using this metadata set. Default is false.

startDateFieldVisibility.description: NOT REQUIRED: The visibility of the start date field for assets using this metadata set. Default is 'visible'.

startDateFieldHelpText.description: NOT REQUIRED: The help text for the start date field.

summaryFieldRequired.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether the summary field is required on assets using this metadata set. Default is false.

summaryFieldVisibility.description: NOT REQUIRED: The visibility of the summary field for assets using this metadata set. Default is 'visible'.

summaryFieldHelpText.description: NOT REQUIRED: The help text for the summary field.

teaserFieldRequired.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether the teaser field is required on assets using this metadata set. Default is false.

teaserFieldVisibility.description: NOT REQUIRED: The visibility of the teaser field for assets using this metadata set. Default is 'visible'.

teaserFieldHelpText.description: NOT REQUIRED: The help text for the teaser field.

titleFieldRequired.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether the title field is required on assets using this metadata set. Default is false.

titleFieldVisibility.description: NOT REQUIRED: The visibility of the title field for assets using this metadata set. Default is 'visible'.

titleFieldHelpText.description: NOT REQUIRED: The help text for the title field.

dynamicMetadataFieldDefinitions.description: NOT REQUIRED: The dynamic metadata field definitions.

MetadataSet.description: This schema represents the properties for MetadataSet.

children.description: NOT REQUIRED: The array of children.

MetadataSetContainer.description: A container that holds metadata sets.

files.description: NOT REQUIRED: A list of files that is included in this publish set. Default is empty.

folders.description: NOT REQUIRED: A list of folders that is included in this publish set. Default is empty.

pages.description: NOT REQUIRED: A list of pages that is included in this publish set. Default is empty.

usesScheduledPublishing.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether or not to publish this set on a schedule. Default is false.

scheduledPublishDestinationMode.description: NOT REQUIRED: Scheduled publish destination selection mode.

scheduledPublishDestinations.description: NOT REQUIRED: Used in conjunction with scheduledPublishDestinationMode when destinations are to be specified explicitly.

timeToPublish.description: NOT REQUIRED: The base time this set will be published. Default is 00:00 (midnight).

sendReportToUsers.description: NOT REQUIRED: Semicolon-delimited list of string user names for which this asset is available for use.

sendReportToGroups.description: NOT REQUIRED: Semicolon-delimited list of string group names for which this asset is available for use.

sendReportOnErrorOnly.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether or not to send a report when there are no errors. Default is false.

publishIntervalHours.description: NOT REQUIRED: Every how many hours the asset should be published. Can be between 1 and 23.

publishDaysOfWeek.description: NOT REQUIRED: Which days of the week the job should publish on.

cronExpression.description: NOT REQUIRED: Cron expression for scheduled publishing.

PublishSet.description: This schema represents the properties for a Publish Set.

PublishSetContainer.description: This schema represents the properties for a Publish Set Container.

children.description: NOT REQUIRED: The array of children assets.

SiteDestinationContainer.description: A container that holds site destinations.

parentContainerId.description:
Priority: parentContainerId > parentContainerPath
- One is REQUIRED
- When inside a Site, this field must refer to a SiteDestinationContainer.
- When not in a Site, this field must refer to a Target

parentContainerPath.description:
Priority: parentContainerId > parentContainerPath
- One is REQUIRED
- When inside a Site, this field must refer to a SiteDestinationContainer.
- When not in a Site, this field must refer to a Target

transportId.description:
Priority: transportId > transportPath
- One is REQUIRED

transportPath.description:
Priority: transportId > transportPath
- One is REQUIRED

applicableGroupNames.description:
Semicolon-delimited list of string group names
- NOT REQUIRED

directory.description:
The directory to place the published files in
- NOT REQUIRED

enabled.description:
Whether or not this destination is enabled for publishing
- NOT REQUIRED

checkedByDefault.description:
Whether or not this destination is checked by default
- NOT REQUIRED

publishASCII.description:
Whether or not to only publish ASCII characters
- NOT REQUIRED

usesScheduledPublishing.description:
Whether or not to publish this set on a schedule
- NOT REQUIRED

scheduledPublishDestinationMode.description: Not used, will be ignored if any value is set

scheduledPublishDestinations.description: Not used, will be ignored if any value is set

timeToPublish.description:
The base time this set will be published.
- For example if one wanted this set to publish at 0100, 0500, 0900, 1300, 1700, 2100, I would enter one of those times here and set the "publishInterval" to 4, and the "publishIntervalUnits" to "hours"
- NOT REQUIRED default: 00:00 (midnight), if cronExpression provided or usesScheduledPublishing is false, ignored

sendReportToUsers.description:
Semicolon-delimited list of string user names
- NOT REQUIRED

sendReportToGroups.description:
Semicolon-delimited list of string group names
- NOT REQUIRED

sendReportOnErrorOnly.description:
Whether or not to send a report when there are no errors
- NOT REQUIRED default: false

webUrl.description:
The base URL for linking to a given configuration during publishing
- NOT REQUIRED

extensionsToStrip.description:
Comma-separated list of extensions to strip from links
- NOT REQUIRED

siteId.description:
Priority: siteId > siteName
- One is REQUIRED

siteName.description:
Priority: siteId > siteName
- One is REQUIRED

publishIntervalHours.description:
Every how many hours the asset should be published. Can be between 1 and 23
- One is REQUIRED if usesScheduledPublishing is true, else NOT REQUIRED and ignored

publishDaysOfWeek.description:
Which days of the week the job should publish on
- One is REQUIRED if usesScheduledPublishing is true, else NOT REQUIRED and ignored

cronExpression.description:
Applicable only if publishInterval Units is "cron"
- One is REQUIRED if usesScheduledPublishing is true, else NOT REQUIRED and ignored

Destination.description: A publishing destination that defines where content is published.

directory.description:
REQUIRED
- The directory to output the files to, for example "c:\inetfiles\wwwroot"

hostName.description:
REQUIRED
- The host name or IP address of the remote server

port.description:
REQUIRED
- The port to use to connect to the server

doPASV.description:
NOT REQUIRED
- Whether or not to connect using PASV mode FTP

username.description:
REQUIRED
- The username to use when connecting to the server

authMode.description:
REQUIRED when ftpProtocolType is SFTP
- The authentication mode to use when connecting to the server. Applicable only when ftpProtocolType is SFTP

privateKey.description:
NOT REQUIRED
- The key to use when connecting to the server. Applicable only when ftpProtocolType is SFTP and authMode is "PUBLIC_KEY"

password.description:
REQUIRED when ftpProtocolType is FTP or FTPS or when ftpProtocolType is SFTP and authMode is "PASSWORD"
- The password to use when connecting to the server

directory.description:
NOT REQUIRED
- The directory to place the files in

ftpProtocolType.description:
REQUIRED
- Whether or not to connect using regular FTP, FTP over SSL/TLS, or SFTP using secure FTP (SSH protocol)

serverName.description:
REQUIRED
- The name of the database server

serverPort.description:
REQUIRED
- The port on which the database server is working

databaseName.description:
REQUIRED
- The name of the database itself

username.description:
REQUIRED
- The username to use when connecting to the server

password.description:
NOT REQUIRED
- The password to use when connecting to the server

bucketName.description:
REQUIRED
- The name of the S3 bucket

basePath.description:
NOT REQUIRED
- The directory to place the files in

children.description:
NOT REQUIRED
- The array of children assets.

applicableGroupNames.description:
NOT REQUIRED
- Semicolon-delimited list of string group names for which this asset is available for use

copy.description:
NOT REQUIRED
- Whether or not this is a copy type workflow

create.description:
NOT REQUIRED
- Whether or not this is a create type workflow

delete.description:
NOT REQUIRED
- Whether or not this is a delete type workflow

edit.description:
NOT REQUIRED
- Whether or not this is an edit type workflow

move.description:
NOT REQUIRED
- Whether or not this is a move type workflow

namingBehavior.description:
REQUIRED
- The naming behavior when an instance of this workflow is created

xml.description:
REQUIRED
- The actual workflow definition XML

completedWorkflowEmailId.description:
NOT REQUIRED
- Custom workflow email to send when email trigger set to completed

notificationWorkflowEmailId.description:
NOT REQUIRED
- Custom workflow email to send when email trigger set to notify

children.description:
NOT REQUIRED
- The array of children assets.

WorkflowDefinitionContainer.description: Properties for the Workflow Definition Container

subject.description:
REQUIRED
- The subject of this email

body.description:
REQUIRED
- The body of this email

children.description:
NOT REQUIRED
- The array of children assets.

WorkflowEmailContainer.description: Properties for the Workflow Email Container

accountName.description:
NOT REQUIRED: The Account Name of the block.
- REQUIRED for Tweets Only and Tweets and Mentions query types.

searchString.description:
NOT REQUIRED: The Search String for the block.
- REQUIRED for Tweets Only and Tweets and Mentions search terms types.

maxResults.description: REQUIRED: The maximum number of tweets which can be shown.

useDefaultStyle.description: REQUIRED: Should the twitter feed block use the default CSS style?

excludeJQuery.description: REQUIRED: Should the twitter feed block include the JQuery API?

queryType.description: REQUIRED: The type of twitter feed block.

TwitterFeedBlock.description: A block that displays a Twitter feed.

users.description: NOT REQUIRED: Comma-delimited list of usernames.

groups.description: NOT REQUIRED: Comma-delimited list of group names.

RoleAssignment.description: Assigns a role to a group or user for access control purposes.

extensionsToStrip.description: NOT REQUIRED: A comma-separated list of extensions that should be stripped from cross-site links pointing to assets in this site. Default: empty

defaultMetadataSetId.description:
NOT REQUIRED: The default metadata set for the site by ID.
- Priority: defaultMetadataSetId > defaultMetadataSetPath

defaultMetadataSetPath.description:
NOT REQUIRED: The default metadata set for the site by path.
- Priority: defaultMetadataSetId > defaultMetadataSetPath

siteAssetFactoryContainerId.description:
NOT REQUIRED: Defines the site asset factory container relationship by ID.
- Priority: siteAssetFactoryContainerId > siteAssetFactoryContainerPath
- This asset factory container will determine which asset factories show on that user's dashboard under the "My New Content Wizards" section in the site.

siteAssetFactoryContainerPath.description:
NOT REQUIRED: Defines the site asset factory container relationship by path.
- Priority: siteAssetFactoryContainerId > siteAssetFactoryContainerPath
- This asset factory container will determine which asset factories show on that user's dashboard under the "My New Content Wizards" section in the site.

defaultEditorConfigurationId.description: NOT REQUIRED: Default editor configuration by ID. Priority: defaultEditorConfigurationId > defaultEditorConfigurationPath

defaultEditorConfigurationPath.description: NOT REQUIRED: Default editor configuration by path.

siteStartingPageId.description:
NOT REQUIRED: Defines the site starting page relationship by ID. Overrides the global starting page.
- Priority: siteStartingPageId > siteStartingPagePath
- This starting page will override the global starting page set in the system preferences
- When editing and selected asset is recycled, it is recommended to preserve this relationship by providing selected asset's id in case if the selected asset gets restored from the recycle bin.

siteStartingPagePath.description:
NOT REQUIRED: Defines the site starting page relationship by path. Overrides the global starting page. Only for non-recycled assets.
- Priority: siteStartingPageId > siteStartingPagePath
- This starting page will override the global starting page set in the system preferences
- When editing and selected asset is recycled, it is recommended to preserve this relationship by providing selected asset's id in case if the selected asset gets restored from the recycle bin.

siteStartingPageRecycled.description: NOT REQUIRED: For reading purposes only. Indicates if the site starting page is recycled.

roleAssignments.description: NOT REQUIRED: Role assignments for the site.

usesScheduledPublishing.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether or not to publish this set on a schedule. Default: false

scheduledPublishDestinationMode.description: NOT REQUIRED: Scheduled publish destination selection mode.

scheduledPublishDestinations.description:
NOT REQUIRED: Destinations to be explicitly specified for scheduled publish.
- Used in conjunction with scheduledPublishDestinationMode when destinations are to be specified explicitly

timeToPublish.description:
NOT REQUIRED: The base time this set will be published. default: 00:00 (midnight), if cronExpression provided or usesScheduledPublishing is false, ignored
- The base time this set will be published. For example, if one wanted this set to publish at 0100, 0500, 0900, 1300, 1700, 2100, I would enter one of those times here and set the "publishInterval" to 4, and the "publishIntervalUnits" to "hours"

sendReportToUsers.description: NOT REQUIRED: Semicolon-delimited list of user names for which this asset is available.

sendReportToGroups.description: NOT REQUIRED: Semicolon-delimited list of group names for which this asset is available.

sendReportOnErrorOnly.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether to send a report only when there are errors. Default: false

recycleBinExpiration.description: REQUIRED: The recycle bin expiration time.

unpublishOnExpiration.description: REQUIRED: Unpublish assets when moved to the expiration folder.

linkCheckerEnabled.description: REQUIRED: Generate broken link report on schedule.

externalLinkCheckOnPublish.description: REQUIRED: Check external links when publishing assets.

inheritNamingRules.description:
REQUIRED: Determines whether naming rules are inherited from the system preferences.
- If true, the rule properties will be ignored when saving, but old values are preserved.
- Otherwise, null values will be defaulted to appropriate values when saving.
- Naming rules read from a site may be null.

namingRuleCase.description: Optional: Defines what case a name can be. Depends on inheritNamingRules.

namingRuleSpacing.description: Optional: Defines how spaces are handled for names. Depends on inheritNamingRules.

namingRuleAssets.description: Optional: Defines the asset types that enforce naming rules. Depends on inheritNamingRules.

siteImproveUrl.description: NOT REQUIRED: Alternative URL for Siteimprove.

widenDamIntegrationEnabled.description: NOT REQUIRED: Enables Widen Collective DAM integration.

widenDamIntegrationCategory.description: NOT REQUIRED: Widen Collective category for search results.

webdamDamIntegrationEnabled.description: NOT REQUIRED: Enables Webdam DAM integration.

rootFolderId.description: NOT REQUIRED: The root folder id, used only when reading a site. Ignored in other cases.

rootAssetFactoryContainerId.description: NOT REQUIRED: Used only when reading a site. Ignored in other cases.

rootPageConfigurationSetContainerId.description: NOT REQUIRED: Used only when reading a site. Ignored in other cases.

rootContentTypeContainerId.description: NOT REQUIRED: Used only when reading a site. Ignored in other cases.

rootConnectorContainerId.description: NOT REQUIRED: Used only when reading a site. Ignored in other cases.

rootDataDefinitionContainerId.description: NOT REQUIRED: Used only when reading a site. Ignored in other cases.

rootSharedFieldContainerId.description: NOT REQUIRED: Used only when reading a site. Ignored in other cases.

rootMetadataSetContainerId.description: NOT REQUIRED: Used only when reading a site. Ignored in other cases.

rootPublishSetContainerId.description: NOT REQUIRED: Used only when reading a site. Ignored in other cases.

rootSiteDestinationContainerId.description: NOT REQUIRED: Used only when reading a site. Ignored in other cases.

rootTransportContainerId.description: NOT REQUIRED: Used only when reading a site. Ignored in other cases.

rootWorkflowDefinitionContainerId.description: NOT REQUIRED: Used only when reading a site. Ignored in other cases.

rootWorkflowEmailContainerId.description: NOT REQUIRED: Used only when reading a site. Ignored in other cases.

extraSettings.description: JSON string representing additional settings for the Site. Keys/values are subject to change. NOT REQUIRED

publishIntervalHours.description:
Optional: Interval in hours for publishing. One of the choices for scheduled publishing.
- Every how many hours the asset should be published. Can be between 1 and 23

publishDaysOfWeek.description:
Optional: Days of the week for publishing. One of the choices for scheduled publishing.
- Which days of the which the job should publish on - select all days to have a daily publish

cronExpression.description:
Optional: Cron expression for scheduled publishing. One of the choices for scheduled publishing.
- Applicable only if publishIntervalUnits is "cron" - only a valid Cron Expression will be accepted

siteId.description:
NOT REQUIRED: when referencing the System Default Editor Configuration (id=DEFAULT, name=Default)
- One is REQUIRED for all other Editor Configurations

siteName.description:
NOT REQUIRED: when referencing the System Default Editor Configuration (id=DEFAULT, name=Default)
- One is REQUIRED for all other Editor Configurations

cssFileId.description:
NOT REQUIRED:
- Priority: cssFileId > cssFilePath
- When editing and the selected asset is recycled, it is recommended to preserve this relationship by providing the selected asset's id in case if the selected asset gets restored from the recycle bin.

cssFilePath.description:
NOT REQUIRED:
- Priority: cssFileId > cssFilePath
- Path works only for non-recycled assets

cssFileRecycled.description: NOT REQUIRED: For reading purposes only. Ignored when editing, copying, etc.

configuration.description: REQUIRED: JSON String for the configuration

One is REQUIRED
- Admin area assets (must be manager or higher to access, no workflowConfiguration needed)

Asset.description:
Properties for each asset type
- Admin area assets require managerial or higher access, and no workflowConfiguration is needed for them.

asset.description: The asset data returned by the read operation.

level.description: REQUIRED: The access level, either 'read' or 'write'.

type.description: REQUIRED: The type of ACL entry, either 'user' or 'group'.

name.description: REQUIRED: The name of the user or group for which this ACL entry applies.

AclEntry.description: A single access control list entry

accessRightsInformation.description: A result of reading the access rights of an asset

ReadAccessRightsResult.description: A result of reading the access rights of an asset

workflowSettings.description: REQUIRED: A result of reading the workflow information of a folder.

ReadWorkflowSettingsResult.description: A result of reading the workflow information of a folder

subscribers.description: REQUIRED: A list of asset identifiers that are subscribed.

manualSubscribers.description: REQUIRED: A list of asset identifiers that are manually subscribed.

identifier.description: REQUIRED: The unique name of this action.

label.description: REQUIRED: The display label for this action.

actionType.description: REQUIRED: The type of action: reverse, forward, next-id.

nextId.description: REQUIRED: The id of the step that will result when this action is chosen by the user.

identifier.description: REQUIRED: The unique name of this step.

label.description: REQUIRED: The display label for this step.

stepType.description: REQUIRED: The type of step ("system", "edit", or "transition").

owner.description: REQUIRED: The owner (user or group name) of this step.

actions.description: NOT REQUIRED: The actions this step contains.

relatedEntity.description: REQUIRED: The asset that is in this workflow.

currentStep.description: REQUIRED: The current step this workflow is at.

orderedSteps.description: NOT REQUIRED: The ordered steps of this workflow.

unorderedSteps.description: NOT REQUIRED: The unordered steps of this workflow.

startDate.description: NOT REQUIRED: The date when the workflow was initialized.

endDate.description: NOT REQUIRED: The due date of the workflow.

completedWorkflowEmailId.description: NOT REQUIRED: Custom workflow email to send when email trigger set to completed.

Workflow.description: Represents a workflow instance's properties in progress.

sites.description: REQUIRED: The identifiers for the sites.

name.description: REQUIRED: The name of the preference.

value.description: REQUIRED: The value of the preference.

identifier.description: Identifier of the asset being published REQUIRED

destinations.description:
NOT REQUIRED: Destinations to which the asset should be published.
- This field is ignored when identifier points to a Destination.
- Publishing an asset that does not allow you to select Destinations in the Cascade UI (Publish Set or Target) *will* respect the Destinations supplied here (this is an inconsistency between the UI and web services).
- Supplying an empty set of identifiers will publish to all Destinations that are enabled and applicable for the user making the web services call.

unpublish.description:
NOT REQUIRED: Whether to unpublish the asset instead of publishing it.
- Similar to the GUI - you can choose to unpublish the asset instead of publishing it.

publishRelatedAssets.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether to publish related assets.

publishRelatedPublishSet.description: NOT REQUIRED: Whether to publish related publish sets.

scheduledDate.description: NOT REQUIRED: The scheduled date for publishing the asset.

PublishInformation.description: Contains information about asset publishing status and schedule.
